about.title: About
about.text1: I am a Junior Full Stack Developer currently studying at Vilnius Coding School in the JavaScript Full Stack program. I specialize in frontend development, focusing on modern technologies.
about.text2: I am currently improving my backend skills.
about.text3: In my free time, I keep learning new technologies and building personal projects.

Countries.title: Rest Countries
Countries.description: Implemented REST API requests and client-side navigation with React Router.

Landing.title: Landing Page
Landing.description: Created a responsive landing page with React and SCSS.

Todo.title: Full Stack Todo App
Todo.description: A full-stack Todo application built with TypeScript, MongoDB and Render.

Wordle.title: Wordle Game
Wordle.description: A web-based implementation of the popular Wordle game.

TVMaze.title: TV Maze API
TVMaze.description: A web application for browsing TV shows using the TVMaze API.

Weather.title: Weather App
Weather.description: A weather application built with React and TypeScript for real-time weather data.

about.title: Apie
about.text1: Esu jaunesnysis Full Stack programuotojas, studijuojantis „JavaScript Full Stack“ programoje Vilnius Coding School. Daugiausia dėmesio skiriu frontend kūrimui ir šiuolaikinėms interneto technologijoms.
about.text2: Šiuo metu aktyviai gilinu backend programavimo žinias.
about.text3: Nuolat tobulinu savo įgūdžius, domiuosi naujomis technologijomis ir kuriu asmeninius projektus.

Countries.title: API Countries React
Countries.description: Įgyvendintos REST API užklausos ir navigacija kliento pusėje naudojant React Router.

Landing.title: Landing Page
Landing.description: Responsive puslapis, sukurtas naudojant JSON duomenis ir React piktogramas.

Todo.title: Full Stack Todo App
Todo.description: Full Stack Todo App, sukurta naudojant TypeScript, MongoDB ir Render.

TVMaze.title: TV Maze API
TVMaze.description: Internetinė programa TV laidoms naršyti naudojant TVMaze API.

Weather.title: Orų programa
Weather.description: Orų programa, sukurta naudojant React ir TypeScript bei naudojanti API realaus laiko orų duomenims gauti.
